evals.prompt: Turn this product shot into a reusable GESTEL template I can swap other products into.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-create-template to extract the blueprint from the single source image, freeze the environment while opening {PRODUCT} and {BRAND} slots, write the template to <scene>.txt, and render one <scene>.webp example after the cost-and-confirmation gate.
assertions: Triggers gestel-create-template
Extracts the five-section blueprint via the gestel-image-reverse-prompt method before templating
Freezes the environment (background, composition, camera, lighting, palette, grading, placement) and opens {PRODUCT} and {BRAND} slots
Writes the template to <scene>.txt
Runs the dry-run preflight and gets explicit cost confirmation before rendering the single <scene>.webp example

evals.prompt: Gestelify this image — rebrand it and give me a template.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-create-template, defaulting the brand slot to GESTEL, lightly varying the tagline/copy so it doesn't read as a copy-paste, and producing one rebranded example render alongside the reusable template.
assertions: Triggers gestel-create-template
Defaults the {BRAND} slot fill to GESTEL
Lightly varies the tagline and secondary copy rather than a mechanical find-and-replace
Produces exactly one example render, not a batch
Applies the cost-confirmation gate before the paid render

evals.prompt: Make a swappable-product template from this bottle photo, brand it 'Aurora'.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-create-template, using the explicitly supplied brand 'Aurora' instead of the GESTEL default while still gating cost before the render.
assertions: Triggers gestel-create-template
Uses the user-supplied brand 'Aurora' to fill the {BRAND} slot instead of the GESTEL default
Still freezes the environment and slotifies {PRODUCT} as usual
Still runs the dry-run preflight and gets explicit cost confirmation before the paid render

evals.prompt: Here are 30 photos from our feed — build our brand visual DNA and category templates.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-create-template. A set of many reference images used to derive brand-wide visual DNA and many category templates is gestel-moodboard, which is reasoning-only and never renders.
assertions: Does not trigger gestel-create-template
Routes to gestel-moodboard for brand-wide visual DNA and category templates from a reference set
Does not attempt to run the single-image freeze/slotify/vary pipeline on a 30-image set
Does not call a paid render provider

evals.prompt: What prompt would recreate this image in GPT Image 2?
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-create-template. Extracting a reproduction prompt only, with no template file and no render, is gestel-image-reverse-prompt.
assertions: Does not trigger gestel-create-template
Routes to gestel-image-reverse-prompt for the reproduction prompt only
Does not write a <scene>.txt template or slotify {PRODUCT}/{BRAND}
Does not render an example image or spend money
